description.ko: 유리와 기하학의 정밀함을 통해 포착되어 색의 스펙트럼으로 나누어진 순수한 에너지입니다.
description.en: Pure energy captured and divided into a spectrum of color through the precision of glass and geometry.

prompt: A macro cinematic shot of a PRISM-2 geometric glass structure, 'The Shattered Diamond Sun.' A single beam of intense white light hits the complex polyhedron, refracting into a brilliant, wide rainbow mandala of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 emerald, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow. Intricate caustic light patterns and sharp chromatic aberration dance across a minimalist matte black surface. 8k resolution, ray-traced lighting, ethereal atmosphere, sharp focus on internal light dispersion and rainbow caustics.
